programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
How to Talk to Girls at Parties
Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: For this grand tour Paul's journey begins at Loch Hourn on the mainland, takes him over the sea to the Isle of Skye, then heads to the tiny island of Soay before ending on Canna.

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: For his final grand tour, Paul heads to Britain's far north: Fetlar, Unst and Yell, islands with as much Scandinavian as Scottish heritage.

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton sets out to experience island life. He uncovers the past and reveals its connections with the present. Here, he explores a cluster of islands in the Outer Hebrides.

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton sets out to experience island life. He uncovers the past and reveals its connections with the present. Here, he explores a cluster of islands in the Outer Hebrides.

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul travels from Finlaggan where the famous ruler Somerled once held court, along Islay's windswept coast, through its historic ports and villages to end on its highest mountain.

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: For his final grand tour, Paul heads to Britain's far north: Fetlar, Unst and Yell, islands with as much Scandinavian as Scottish heritage.

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton sets out to experience island life. He uncovers the past and reveals its connections with the present. Here, he explores a cluster of islands in the Outer Hebrides.

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: War And Peace In The North

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton sets out to experience island life. He uncovers the past and reveals its connections with the present. Here, he explores a cluster of islands in the Outer Hebrides.

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship is in Iceland for the very first time in its history, embarking on a cruise that will take in some of Scandinavia's most stunning scenery.

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The cruise continues through the fjord lands of Scandinavia. Assistant Cruise Director Lucy has to unexpectedly cover for her boss. With a busy cruise ahead, will she be able to deliver the holiday of a lifetime?

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The Seven Seas Splendour is on a Baltic Odyssey, with stunning views readily available. Taking in impressive destinations such as Norway and Latvia, the crew on board want to go out with a bang.

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The majestic Seven Seas Splendor is docked in Southampton, ahead of a stunning cruise around the Mediterranean. Welcoming guests on-board is a new entertainment team.

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The Seven Seas Splendor continues its luxurious cruise around the Mediterranean. But will the cruise be over before it even begins?

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The crew are on tenterhooks, as on board is one of the most influential travel writers. A good review will bring in new guests, but if he finds the service lacking, his write-up could spell trouble.

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: It's Christmas on board the world's most expensive cruise ship. With 732 new and expectant guests, it's down to the tireless crew to pull off a Christmas like never before.

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The cruise continues through the fjord lands of Scandinavia. Assistant Cruise Director Lucy has to unexpectedly cover for her boss. With a busy cruise ahead, will she be able to deliver the holiday of a lifetime?

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: Executive Head Chef Ronald is in his element as he visits a local fish market in Bergen to source produce to wow the guests, but there's a VIP coming on board. Can his kitchen team show they have what it takes?

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The Seven Seas Splendour is on a Baltic Odyssey, with stunning views readily available. Taking in impressive destinations such as Norway and Latvia, the crew on board want to go out with a bang.

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The majestic Seven Seas Splendor is docked in Southampton, ahead of a stunning cruise around the Mediterranean. Welcoming guests on-board is a new entertainment team.

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The Seven Seas Splendor continues its luxurious cruise around the Mediterranean. But will the cruise be over before it even begins?

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The crew are on tenterhooks, as on board is one of the most influential travel writers. A good review will bring in new guests, but if he finds the service lacking, his write-up could spell trouble.

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The stunning Seven Seas Splendor sail around the Canary Islands while celebrating the company's 30th anniversary.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The competition between teams of reality TV veterans concludes with the men searching through thousands of pounds of ice, and the women getting spiders dumped on them.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Teala Dunn huddle indoors and swear off camping forever.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The competition between teams of reality TV veterans concludes with the men searching through thousands of pounds of ice, and the women getting spiders dumped on them.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: After three gruelling trips working on Icelandic longline fishing boats, the greenhorns have three more days to prove they have what it takes to win a full deckhand contract.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On the Dalton, extreme temperatures have the oil fields on the verge of a cold weather shutdown, leaving Jack Jessee scrambling to get out of town. Austin makes a time-saving decision to not chain up.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Kurt Shepherd loses his way hauling a hut across Australia. Johnny Dowell drags a stack of steel up a horror desert track and for trucker Michael Grantham it's a wild ride, with a whole lot of horsepower.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: There's trouble in the wind for Kurt Shepherd who is struggling with a load causing oversized problems. For Johnny Dowell on the Tanami Track it's too hard one minute and too soft the next.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In North Carolina, a forgotten '53 Crestline goes from rat resort to regal ride; in Minnesota, Jeremy and his team try to get decades worth of dust and dirt extracted from a special edition Mustang.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Spin a web with the Pawn Stars as Corey and Chumlee check out a copy of Amazing Fantasy #15, featuring the very first appearance of Spider-Man.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Join the guys as they check out a wanted poster for legendary criminal John Dillinger.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Get starstruck with the team when the guys check out an original poem handwritten by Marilyn Monroe.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Kurt Shepherd loses his way hauling a hut across Australia. Johnny Dowell drags a stack of steel up a horror desert track and for trucker Michael Grantham it's a wild ride, with a whole lot of horsepower.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: There's trouble in the wind for Kurt Shepherd who is struggling with a load causing oversized problems. For Johnny Dowell on the Tanami Track it's too hard one minute and too soft the next.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Serve time with the team when they check out a lap desk made by Dr Samuel Mudd.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Join the guys as they check out a wanted poster for legendary criminal John Dillinger.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: After three gruelling trips working on Icelandic longline fishing boats, the greenhorns have three more days to prove they have what it takes to win a full deckhand contract.

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert and friend and fellow comedian Angela Barnes cross Italy's most treacherous Alpine roads in Rhod's first adventure since being treated for cancer.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Kurt Shepherd loses his way hauling a hut across Australia. Johnny Dowell drags a stack of steel up a horror desert track and for trucker Michael Grantham it's a wild ride, with a whole lot of horsepower.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Set in the dreaded DMV office, following quirky minimum-wage employees who make the best of dealing with annoyed customers, finding solace in each other's company.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Chaos at the DMV drives a new hire to quit, leaving Colette worried Noa will too. Staff and customers battle the heat with a failing air conditioner.

programme.title: Saturday Night Live
programme.desc: Host Nikki Glaser; sombr performs.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Comedians are set tasks challenging their creativity and wit. The tasks are supervised by Alex Horne but the Taskmaster, Greg Davies, always has the final word.

programme.title: WBBL: Scorchers v Stars
programme.desc: Beth Mooney and Meg Lanning meet in a marquee battle between Australia's elite batters.

programme.title: WBBL: Scorchers v Stars
programme.desc: Beth Mooney and Meg Lanning meet in a marquee battle between Australia's elite batters.

programme.title: The Grade Cricketer With Mark Waugh
programme.desc: The Grade Cricketers catch up with Mark Waugh to chat India, England and horse racing.

programme.desc: The Grade Cricketers catch up with Mark Waugh to chat India, England and horse racing.

programme.desc: Play continues from Bermuda where the fall series continues and rising stars battle for PGA Tour status.

programme.desc: Play continues from Bermuda where the fall series continues and rising stars battle for PGA Tour status.

programme.desc: Third round coverage of the The NSW Open begins from the The Vintage Golf Course, Hunter Valley.

programme.title: Golf: DP World Tour Championship Round 2
programme.desc: The season-final field features McIlroy, Fleetwood, Hatton and Rose as the Race to Dubai title battle continues.

programme.title: Golf: DP World Tour Championship Round 2
programme.desc: The season-final field features McIlroy, Fleetwood, Hatton and Rose as the Race to Dubai title battle continues.

programme.desc: Third round action of the Tour Championship begins from Jumeirah Golf Estates, Dubai.

programme.title: Golf: USLPGA: The Annika Round 2

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter. It's the final chapter in the time-travelling comedy series.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is back and now he's one of the good guys, assigned to protect freedom fighter John Connor from a cyborg sent by the leader of the human resistance in the future.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Incompetent detective Frank Drebin has to foil an attempt to assassinate the Queen as he woos Priscilla Presley.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Fright Night
programme.desc: Teenage Charley Brewster is a horror-film junkie, so it's no surprise that when a reclusive new neighbor moves next-door, Brewster becomes convinced he's a vampire.

programme.title: Fright Night
programme.desc: Teenage Charley Brewster is a horror-film junkie, so it's no surprise that when a reclusive new neighbor moves next-door, Brewster becomes convinced he's a vampire.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Earth is covered with water and the human race struggles to survive on dilapidated boats and makeshift floating cities.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A slick, young Navy lawyer is assigned to investigate a murder case in which two Marines killed a fellow enlisted man, and no one's talking.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A slick, young Navy lawyer is assigned to investigate a murder case in which two Marines killed a fellow enlisted man, and no one's talking.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: From crumbling ceilings to time-worn turrets, British families discover what it takes to buy and renovate beautiful chateaux in France.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team returns to Ham House, where treasures include an 18th-century effigy and an Indian Order of Merit medal awarded to a Sikh soldier in WWI.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles is at the helm of today's Bargain Hunt from the Lincolnshire Antiques and Home show. Helping out the teams are experts Jonathan Pratt and Gary Pe. Meanwhile Eric explores the concept of Wabi Sabi, finding beauty in imperfection in Asian inspired pottery.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Tree surgeon David, 27, is airlifted to St George's after falling 40 feet from a tree. Anne, 74, arrives at St George's with a sharp pain in her chest.

programme.title: Celebrity Sewing Bee Festive Specials
programme.desc: The Vivienne, Lesley Joseph, Sabrina Grant and Sally Philips must create a New Year's Eve party dress that evokes memories of a particular New Year's Eve, with surprising results.

programme.title: Find Me A Beach House
programme.desc: Warren and Fran have two teenage daughters and are leaving behind their family home on acreage. Now they want a home by the water and are looking at Mount Eliza on Victoria's Mornington Peninsula.

programme.title: Luxury Escapes: World's Best Holidays
programme.desc: Pia Miranda and Mike Reid sail the Sun Princess with fine dining onboard, exploring Gibraltar, Provence, and Italy's glittering Cinque Terre.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Six years ago, high school sweethearts Mick and Brooke made the move from their hometown in country Queensland to the Sunshine Coast for a sea change. They purchased the house quickly, without knowing the area and soon realised it was not going to give them the buzzing, beachside lifestyle they were looking for. But its not just the location, the layout of the house is dysfunctional and outdated with a lot of unused space and untapped potential. Mick loves the size of their block, the oversized car port and the privacy, but as he is a FIFO worker, Brooke is home alone half the year and is often left feeling lonely and isolated. Will Neale be able to make Brooke fall in love with their home enough so that the location won't matter? Or will Andrew's search of the best beach side suburbs show Mick the light?

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help people who are unhappy with their homes and guide them with their valuable tips to renovate their abodes.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The clock is ticking for NHS workers Emily and Joe, who don't have long before they have to move out of their apartment. Kirstie needs to act fast to find a place which is more than just a starter home.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Bryce and Veronica are helping two couples on the opposite end of their property journeys. Upsizers Ben and Amelia are moving from Melbourne to the Gold Coast while Sue and Barney are going back to their roots in Wagga Wagga.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Jacqui and Brian were asking $630,000 for their two-storey, four-bedroom weatherboard home in Mitcham, Victoria, half an hour east of Melbourne. But it has been on the market for five months without an agent.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Teachers Peter and Anastasia need to upsize for their expanding family. They've been trying to sell their three-bedroom, 1920s bungalow for 12 months with an asking price of between $640,000 and $650,000.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Can Neale convince Brooke to fall in love with their Buderim home so the location no longer matters, or will Andrew's hunt for the best Sunshine Coast suburb change Mick's mind?

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Perth couple Angelo and Kasi are obsessed with concrete, particularly in 1950s Brutalist architecture. But when they get the drawings back from their architect, they're in for a surprise that will challenge them.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help people who are unhappy with their homes and guide them with their valuable tips to renovate their abodes.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help people who are unhappy with their homes and guide them with their valuable tips to renovate their abodes.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Cole and Jane are hippies at heart with a blended family of six kids. Owner-builders, they're working from a design they came up with themselves based on a heart with four chambers.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Jacqui and Brian were asking $630,000 for their two-storey, four-bedroom weatherboard home in Mitcham, Victoria, half an hour east of Melbourne. But it has been on the market for five months without an agent.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Can Neale convince Brooke to fall in love with their Buderim home so the location no longer matters, or will Andrew's hunt for the best Sunshine Coast suburb change Mick's mind?

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Tree surgeon David, 27, is airlifted to St George's after falling 40 feet from a tree. Anne, 74, arrives at St George's with a sharp pain in her chest.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews treat a drug user with a burst abscess, an elderly woman whose face has swollen, and a young woman with a possible miscarriage, plus race against time to get a patient with a suspected stroke to hospital.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with Marie. His plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: A wisecracking New Yorker, whose one-night stand with a beautiful Mexican girl comes back to bite him - all the way to the altar.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Since Elizabeth, who is a down-to-earth high school teacher, and Donovan, a reserved New York businessman, are so different, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: The Dressmaker
programme.desc: With her glamorous style and sewing machine in tow, a woman returns to her remote home town to set things right, but finds her talent by transforming the women she left behind.

programme.title: The Dressmaker
programme.desc: With her glamorous style and sewing machine in tow, a woman returns to her remote home town to set things right, but finds her talent by transforming the women she left behind.

programme.title: Something New
programme.desc: A corporate lawyer finds love in the most unexpected place when she agrees to go on a blind date with a sexy and free-spirited landscaper.

programme.title: Something New
programme.desc: A corporate lawyer finds love in the most unexpected place when she agrees to go on a blind date with a sexy and free-spirited landscaper.

programme.title: Something Borrowed
programme.desc: Rachel is a generous and loyal pal to her engaged best friend Darcy. But after celebrating her 30th birthday, perpetual good girl Rachel unexpectedly ends up in the arms of Darcy's fiance.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Greg is poised to propose to his girlfriend during a visit to her parents' home. But he needs to ask her father. However, Pam's ex-CIA father takes an immediate dislike to her less-than-truthful beau.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Greg is poised to propose to his girlfriend during a visit to her parents' home. But he needs to ask her father. However, Pam's ex-CIA father takes an immediate dislike to her less-than-truthful beau.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Something to Talk About
programme.desc: A contemporary Southern wife and mother has the 'perfect life'. But when she learns that her husband has been unfaithful, she steps back and examines her life from a new perspective.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A smooth-talking rooster crash-lands into a farm and attempts to help a group of chickens escape. With teamwork and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt for freedom.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: While the chickens on evil Mrs Tweedy's farm dream of a better life, a clever hen named Ginger is hatching plans to fly the coop for good. The only problem is, chickens can't fly or can they? Every escape attempt goes fowl until Rocky, a smooth-talking All-American rooster, crash-lands into the coop. It's hardly poultry in motion when Rocky attempts to teach Ginger and her fine feathered friends to fly but, with teamwork, determination and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt in a spectacular bid for freedom! Featuring unforgettable characters, incredible animation and all-star voice talent, this instant classic from the academy Award-winning creators of Wallace & Gromit is eggs-traordinary fun for the whole family!

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: Mr Peabody, the most accomplished dog in the world, and his mischievous boy Sherman, use their time machine - the WABAC - to go on the most outrageous adventures known to man or dog. But when Sherman takes the WABAC out for a joyride to impress his friend Penny, they accidentally rip a hole in the universe, wreaking havoc on the most important events in world history. Before they forever alter the past, present and future, Mr. Peabody must come to their rescue, ultimately facing the most daunting challenge of any era: figuring out how to be a parent. Together, the time traveling trio will make their mark on history.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: Mr Peabody, the most accomplished dog in the world, and his mischievous boy Sherman, use their time machine - the WABAC - to go on the most outrageous adventures known to man or dog. But when Sherman takes the WABAC out for a joyride to impress his friend Penny, they accidentally rip a hole in the universe, wreaking havoc on the most important events in world history. Before they forever alter the past, present and future, Mr. Peabody must come to their rescue, ultimately facing the most daunting challenge of any era: figuring out how to be a parent. Together, the time traveling trio will make their mark on history.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A high velocity comedy about an underdog snail who kicks into overdrive when he miraculously attains the power of super-speed. But after making fast friends with a crew of streetwise, tricked-out es-car-goes, Turbo learns that no one succeeds on their own. So he puts his heart and shell on the line to help his pals achieve their dreams, before Turbo-charging his own impossible dream: winning the Indy 500.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: Spirit is a wild and rambunctious stallion who travels across the frontiers of the Old West; where he befriends a young human and finds true love with a mare.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: Spirit is a wild and rambunctious stallion who travels across the frontiers of the Old West; where he befriends a young human and finds true love with a mare.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: Seven-year-old Tim Templeton suddenly finds his share of parental love plummeting when his new baby brother arrives - wearing a suit and toting a briefcase - and makes it clear to everyone that he's in charge. But when Tim discovers that Boss Baby is on a secret mission, he reluctantly agrees to team up with his pint-sized sibling for an epic adventure that might just change the world!

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: Seven-year-old Tim Templeton suddenly finds his share of parental love plummeting when his new baby brother arrives - wearing a suit and toting a briefcase - and makes it clear to everyone that he's in charge. But when Tim discovers that Boss Baby is on a secret mission, he reluctantly agrees to team up with his pint-sized sibling for an epic adventure that might just change the world!

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: Taking place in a Manhattan apartment building, Max's life as a favourite pet is turned upside down, when his owner brings home a sloppy mongrel named Duke. They have to put their quarrels behind when they find out that an adorable white bunny named Snowball is building an army of lost pets determined to take revenge.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: Taking place in a Manhattan apartment building, Max's life as a favourite pet is turned upside down, when his owner brings home a sloppy mongrel named Duke. They have to put their quarrels behind when they find out that an adorable white bunny named Snowball is building an army of lost pets determined to take revenge.

programme.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
programme.desc: In the epic action-adventure Snow White and the Huntsman, Kristen Stewart plays the only person in the land fairer than the evil queen (Academy Award (R) winner Charlize Theron) out to destroy her. But what the wicked ruler never imagined is that the young woman threatening her reign has been training in the art of war with a huntsman (Chris Hemsworth) dispatched to kill her. Sam Claflin joins the cast as the prince long enchanted by Snow White's beauty and power.

programme.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
programme.desc: In the epic action-adventure Snow White and the Huntsman, Kristen Stewart plays the only person in the land fairer than the evil queen (Academy Award (R) winner Charlize Theron) out to destroy her. But what the wicked ruler never imagined is that the young woman threatening her reign has been training in the art of war with a huntsman (Chris Hemsworth) dispatched to kill her. Sam Claflin joins the cast as the prince long enchanted by Snow White's beauty and power.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains new-found, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains new-found, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: Based on a true story, veteran deep-sea divers brave brutal ocean conditions to save a trapped crew-mate stranded hundreds of feet beneath the surface.

programme.title: Gray Matter
programme.desc: Aurora has known all her life from her mother that the superhuman abilities they have also make them dangerous. Now, Aurora will discover if her mother was speaking the truth.

programme.title: Housos Vs. Authority
programme.desc: A petty crook embarks on a road trip to Uluru in a drug-laden campervan.

programme.title: Half-Baked: Totally High
programme.desc: Three potheads sell a strain of magical weed to raise funds for their friend's funeral.

programme.title: Half-Baked: Totally High
programme.desc: Three potheads sell a strain of magical weed to raise funds for their friend's funeral.

programme.title: A Million Ways to Die in the West
A Million Ways to Die in the West
Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca, a freshman at her new college, finds herself muscled into a clique whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together in perfect harmony in this laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca, a freshman at her new college, finds herself muscled into a clique whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together in perfect harmony in this laugh-out-loud comedy.
